home.attr.content.0001: SolForge - Find the Right Tool Fast
home.attr.content.0002: Search developer tools and life calculators, then use them instantly.
home.attr.placeholder.0035: Example: JSON, character count, D-Day, unit conversion
home.meta.description: Search and use everyday tools for SQL, JSON, character counts, Korean/English keyboard fixes, URLs, UUIDs, units, age, dates, D-Day, and solar/lunar calendars.
home.meta.title: SolForge - Developer, Text, and Life Tools in One Place
home.text.0018: This is a SolForge browser tool.
home.text.0033: From development work, text processing, and unit conversion to date and solar/lunar calculations, search for the feature you need and open it right away.
home.text.0049: Calculate accurately from a birth date
home.text.0052: Calculate the difference between two dates
home.text.0066: Inputs are not stored on a server
home.text.0069: Choose a broad category on the home page, then search detailed tools in the full directory.
home.text.0076: Character count, keyboard fix, cleanup, masking
home.text.0082: Crypto, QR, GIF, ASCII, games, devices
home.text.0091: Choose a category or search by tool name.
home.text.0104: Automatically format complex SQL queries and highlight syntax.
home.text.0109: Visualize execution order, estimated cost, and risk points in a query plan.
home.text.0113: Calculate international age, Korean age, year age, and adult status.
home.text.0117: Check age by birth year and traditional Korean age terms.
home.text.0121: Find your zodiac animal and matching zodiac years from a birth year.
home.text.0125: Check traditional zodiac compatibility and Samjae years.
